scripts.clean: node -e "const path=require('path'); let p=process.env.npm_package_json||''; if (p.charCodeAt(0)===92&&p.charCodeAt(1)===92&&p.charCodeAt(2)===63&&p.charCodeAt(3)===92) p=p.slice(4); require(path.join(path.dirname(p),'scripts','clean.cjs')).remove(['.next','.next-dev'])"
